response.justification: While the candidate has broad full-stack experience and notable open-source geospatial contributions via GISCollective, they lack direct experience with C++ or Rust in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and show no evidence of working with navigation systems, routing tiles, or distributed systems for map data freshness and latency optimization — all core requirements of the role.
strengths: Strong open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world NGO usage
Demonstrated ability to work across diverse tech stacks and learn new languages quickly
Active contributor to testing frameworks and developer tooling, showing engineering discipline
concerns: No professional C++ or Rust experience in routing, navigation, or geospatial data pipelines
Lack of demonstrated expertise in distributed systems, fault tolerance, or real-time map update integration
Primary tech stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang — minimal alignment with required C++ focus
